tasks.title: Unit tests for the new validation helpers

phases.title: Strengthen note input validation (gh-toy-v6z)

tasks.title: Extend validateCreateInput and validateUpdateInput for blank content and blank tag entries
tasks.notes: Extended validateCreateInput and validateUpdateInput to reject blank content and blank/whitespace-only tag entries. Tags are trimmed in returned data. Used isBlankString helper throughout, no inline trim checks.

tasks.title: Add list/search query-string and path-param validation helpers
tasks.notes: Added validateListQuery and validateIdParam exports to validation.ts.

tasks.title: Unit tests for the extended validators
tasks.notes: Tests written and committed but UNVERIFIED. npm install and npm test both require sandbox approval. node_modules not present in worktree. Cannot run tests to verify they pass. Code review required.

tasks.title: Wire validateListQuery into GET /api/notes
tasks.notes: Wired validateListQuery into GET / handler. Returns 400 with errors array on invalid query params. Uses trimmed values from result.data.

tasks.title: Integration tests for blank-string rejection across note endpoints
tasks.notes: Tests written and committed but UNVERIFIED due to missing node_modules.

tasks.notes: Created meta.ts with NAME and VERSION constants, GET /version and GET /help handlers. No any types, no package.json import.
